arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge backs Vincent Kompany through thick and thin
arts.sum: Bayern Munich legend Karl-Heinz Rummenigge knows that each coach at the club can relate to the saying, “heavy is the head that wears the crown.” I believe that the players are grateful to Vincent for letting them play the way they had this fun and this success,” Rummenigge told kicker’s Georg Holzner (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: “No favorites” — Bayer Leverkusen exec expects intense battle with Bayern Munich in Champions League
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen managing director for sport Simon Rolfes thinks that his club and Champions League Round of 16 opponent Bayern Munich match-up well. Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Preview: Bayern Munich vs. Eintracht Frankfurt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Bundesliga clash between Bayern Munich and Eintracht Frankfurt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.sum: Bayern Munich CEO Jan-Christian Dreesen is excited about his club’s drawing of Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League . Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich’s Champions League draw of Bayer Leverkusen?

arts.ttl: Augsburg Trolls Bayern Munich Over Kit Similarities
arts.sum: In a playful social media jab, FC Augsburg has poked fun at Bayern Munich's newly released 125th anniversary jersey, claiming the German champions have taken inspiration from its bordeaux-colored away kit released around a half year earlier.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane wants to see “right attitude”, “more intensity” vs. Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Can Bayern Munich shake it all off and get back to looking like a powerhouse? Bayern Munich star Harry Kane is battling a calf issue at the moment where the team’s struggling attack desperately needs him at his best.

arts.ttl: Dayot Upamecano wants release clause in new Bayern Munich contract
arts.sum: After extending the contracts of Manuel Neuer, Alphonso Davies and Jamal Musiala, Bayern Munich are working on the extensions of Dayot Upamecano and Joshua Kimmich. But while Upamecano and Bayern…

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich president ‘optimistic’ about Joshua Kimmich’s renewal
arts.sum: Is a Kimmich extension the right move? However, Kimmich seems to be moving towards a renewal, or at least that's what the signs from the high-ups say.

arts.ttl: Bayern München 25-26 Away Training Kit Leaked - Matching the Away Kit Color
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak FC Bayern München's 2025-2026 away training kit, with the colors matching their 25-26 away shirt.

arts.ttl: Man Utd plot STUNNING Rashford swap transfer for Bayern Munich wonderkid
arts.sum: Rashford is currently on loan at Aston Villa, who have a buy option of more than €40 million on the 27-year-old, and has impressed in his first two appearances for the club, seemingly encouraging United of a market to sell him if he returns to Old Trafford in the summer. Manchester United are reportedly exploring an ambitious transfer that would see Marcus Rashford move to Bayern Munich this summer in exchange for one of the German side’s brightest wonderkids.
